searched_sources.result: Contract read before acting. Relevant constraints preserved: proof floor 20, no live side effects, archive is read-only, market-close losses must stay separate from attached TP proof, negative expectancy must remain visible.

Input plan confirms current exact TP proof is 17 wins / 0 losses with proof_floor 20 and 3 samples missing. It forbids live orders, cancels, closes, launchd changes, gate loosening, proof-floor lowering, negative-expectancy hiding, market-close leakage hiding, 4x lot backsolve, and secret printing.
SCOUT remains blocked: status SCOUT_BLOCKED_OPERATOR_REVIEW and scout_mode_allowed=false.

Closest harvest candidate is EUR_USD|SHORT|BREAKOUT_FAILURE with TAKE_PROFIT_ORDER proof 17 trades / 0 losses / proof gap 3, live_promotion_allowed=false, and blockers FORECAST_ADVERSE_PATH_BLOCK, GUARDIAN_OPERATOR_REVIEW_BLOCK, MARKET_CLOSE_LEAK_PRESENT, NOT_IN_PROOF_QUEUE, SAMPLE_GAP.

Global capture economics remains negative: 229 trades, win_rate 0.5983, avg_win_jpy 418.0, avg_loss_jpy 1063.9, expectancy_jpy_per_trade -177.4, net_jpy -40616.9. Target shape still has market-close leak: 10 market-close losses for -7636.3 JPY.

Current attributed target-shape proof remained 17 existing TP wins. Duplicate check for accepted legacy trade IDs 469278, 469427, and 469898 returned duplicate_count=0 in execution_events/order_id rows.

Cross-checked chunks, seat_outcomes, pretrade_outcomes, and trades rows for strategy equivalence. Accepted records contain shelf retest, failed shelf retest, upper-box fade, or medium-term breakout/failure wording. Ambiguous TP rows were kept out of accepted proof.

Searched daily/state/strategy memory markdown. Raw archive supports 469278 and 469427 directly. For 469898, raw state.md supports the live direct-USD breakout/failure family while legacy_history.db live_trade_events carries the exact entry and TAKE_PROFIT_ORDER close rows.

MONTH_SCALE_TP_PROGRESS_REPLAY_STILL_NEGATIVE: global month-scale TP-progress replay residual remains a blocker from the input plan.
GUARDIAN_RECEIPT_OPERATOR_REVIEW_REQUIRED and live gateway blockers remain; proof-floor recovery does not create live permission.
